acholi.win_battleship_in_30_shots_or_fewer: Lo battleship i shots 30 onyo ma nok
acholi.colored_regions_are_the_four_quadrants: 🗺 Kabedo ma ki color gin quadrant angwen. Lok focus point ma piny me neno kite ma cwalle.
acholi.animate_walk_from_origin_to_this_point: Nyut wot ki origin nio point man
acholi.why_coordinates_have_two_numbers: 💡 Piŋo coordinates gitye ki namba aryo
acholi.every_point_on_the_plane_has_exactly_t: Every point on the plane has exactly two numbers.
acholi.the_first_is_the_x_coordinate_how_far_: The first is the x-coordinate (how far horizontal from origin: right is +, left is −). The second is the y-coordinate (how far vertical: up is +, down is −).
acholi.3_2_is_not_the_same_point_as_2_3_the_f: (3, 2) is NOT the same point as (2, 3). The first number always pairs with x, the second always with y. Memory hook: "x comes first" alphabetically.
acholi.q_i_both_positive_top_right_q_ii_x_is_: Q I both positive (top-right). Q II x is negative (top-left). Q III both negative (bottom-left). Q IV y is negative (bottom-right). The roman numerals go counterclockwise from top-right.
acholi.across_the_x_axis_y_flips_across_the_y: Across the x-axis: y flips. Across the y-axis: x flips. Through the origin: both flip. It is the simplest transformation in coordinate geometry.
acholi.columns_files_are_letters_a_h_rows_ran: Columns (files) are letters a-h. Rows (ranks) are numbers 1-8. Every square has a letter+number coordinate. The white queen starts at d1, the black king at e8.
acholi.practice_mode_translate_squares_to_not: 🎯 Practice mode — lok squares i notation
acholi.type_the_chess_notation_for_the_highli: Coo chess notation pi square ma odony
acholi.alternates_two_directions_see_the_squa: Alternates two directions: see-the-square name it, hear-the-name find it. 5 in a row earns the ♟️ Chess Master badge.
acholi.chess_notation_works_because_it_pairs_: 💡 Chess notation works because it pairs one number-system (letters as positions) with another (numbers as positions). The "name" of the square IS its coordinate, just written differently than (5, 4).
acholi.i_will_hide_4_ships_sizes_4_3_3_2_on_a: I will hide 4 ships (sizes 4, 3, 3, 2) on a 10×10 grid. Letters A-J across, numbers 1-10 down. Call coordinates to find them. All ships sunk = you win.
acholi.call_coordinates_to_find_the_ships: Call coordinates to find the ships.
acholi.click_any_cell_to_fire_hit_miss_a_ship: Click any cell to fire. 💥 = hit, · = miss. A ship is sunk when all its cells are hit.
acholi.type_a_battleship_coordinate_like_b5_t: Type a Battleship coordinate like B5, then press Enter to fire
acholi.or_tab_through_cells_and_press_enter: onyo Tab i cells ka idii Enter
acholi.naval_coordinates_work_the_same_way_as: Naval coordinates work the same way as math coordinates. Letter + number = a point on the grid.
acholi.latitude_and_longitude_earth_s_coordin: Latitude and longitude: Earth’s coordinate system.
acholi.lat_tells_you_how_far_north_south_of_t: Lat tells you how far north/south of the equator (0° to 90°, N positive, S negative). Lon tells you how far east/west of the prime meridian (−180° to 180°). Every place on Earth has two numbers.
acholi.practice_mode_find_the_place_from_its_: 🎯 Practice mode — nong kabedo ki coordinates megi
acholi.click_on_the_map_above_within_15_of_th: Click on the map above. Within 15° of the target counts as correct.
acholi.trains_spatial_reasoning_lat_lon_to_a_: Trains spatial reasoning: lat/lon to a position on the planet. 5 correct earns the 🌍 World Geographer badge.
acholi.every_lat_lon_pair_is_a_coordinate_jus: 💡 Every (lat, lon) pair is a coordinate just like (x, y), just at planetary scale. Negative lat = south, negative lon = west. GPS, weather maps, ship navigation — all the same idea.
acholi.why_these_are_all_coordinate_planes: 💡 Piŋo magi ducu gin coordinate planes
acholi.the_file_letter_a_h_is_column_1_8_the_: The file letter a-h is column 1-8. The rank number is row 1-8. e4 = (5, 4) underneath.
acholi.identical_structure_to_chess_letter_fo: Identical structure to chess. Letter for column, number for row. B5 = (2, 5).
acholi.latitude_longitude_degrees_north_south: Latitude + longitude: degrees north/south + degrees east/west.
acholi.same_two_number_pair_idea_scaled_to_a_: Same two-number-pair idea, scaled to a sphere. Portland, Maine is at (43.66°N, 70.26°W). GPS, weather, ship navigation: all coordinates.
acholi.every_grid_system_in_the_world_is_a_fi: every grid system in the world is a (first-number, second-number) pair. Once a student sees that chess notation and (x, y) are the same thing, the algebra grid stops feeling alien.
acholi.reset_all_points_lines_and_quadrant_to: Dwok points, lines, ki quadrant tour ducu odoco
acholi.fill_in_rise_y_run_x_then_slope_m_rise: Fill in rise (Δy), run (Δx), then slope (m = rise/run)
acholi.try_2x_1_linear_slope_2_x_3_negative_s: Try: 2x+1 (linear, slope 2), -x+3 (negative slope, y-intercept 3), x^2 (parabola), 0.5x-2 (fractional slope). Use ^ for exponents.
acholi.sliders_for_x_and_y_widget_tells_you_w: Sliders for x and y. Widget tells you which discrete region you are in. No score, no reveal.
acholi.hypothesis_what_sign_combinations_defi: Hypothesis: What sign combinations define each quadrant?
acholi.place_a_point_in_each_quadrant_look_at: Place a point in each quadrant. Look at the signs.
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aniaŋ — tit ki lok na kikoma
acholi.explain_the_sign_pattern_that_defines_: Explain the sign pattern that defines each quadrant.
acholi.design_note_discrete_7_state_region_ma: Design note: discrete 7-state region marker; no coordinate score; no reveal — by design.
acholi.c_connect_mode_r_clear_ai_tutor: ⌨️ C: connect mode | R: clear | ?: AI tutor

chin_falam.c_connect_mode_r_clear_ai_tutor: ⌨️ C: connect mode | R: clear | ?: AI tutor

chin_hakha.plot_points_in_all_4_quadrants: Points kha quadrant 4 vialte ah chiah
chin_hakha.win_battleship_in_30_shots_or_fewer: Battleship kha shots 30 asiloah a tlawm deuh in tei
chin_hakha.colored_regions_are_the_four_quadrants: 🗺 Rong a ngeimi hmun cu quadrant pali an si. A cunglei i focus point kha thlengin a lengnak kha zoh.
chin_hakha.animate_walk_from_origin_to_this_point: Origin in hi point tiang kalnak langhter
chin_hakha.why_coordinates_have_two_numbers: 💡 Zeicah coordinates nih number pahnih an ngeih
chin_hakha.every_point_on_the_plane_has_exactly_t: Every point on the plane has exactly two numbers.
chin_hakha.the_first_is_the_x_coordinate_how_far_: The first is the x-coordinate (how far horizontal from origin: right is +, left is −). The second is the y-coordinate (how far vertical: up is +, down is −).
chin_hakha.3_2_is_not_the_same_point_as_2_3_the_f: (3, 2) is NOT the same point as (2, 3). The first number always pairs with x, the second always with y. Memory hook: "x comes first" alphabetically.
chin_hakha.q_i_both_positive_top_right_q_ii_x_is_: Q I both positive (top-right). Q II x is negative (top-left). Q III both negative (bottom-left). Q IV y is negative (bottom-right). The roman numerals go counterclockwise from top-right.
chin_hakha.across_the_x_axis_y_flips_across_the_y: Across the x-axis: y flips. Across the y-axis: x flips. Through the origin: both flip. It is the simplest transformation in coordinate geometry.
chin_hakha.columns_files_are_letters_a_h_rows_ran: Columns (files) are letters a-h. Rows (ranks) are numbers 1-8. Every square has a letter+number coordinate. The white queen starts at d1, the black king at e8.
chin_hakha.practice_mode_translate_squares_to_not: 🎯 Practice mode — squares kha notation ah lehter
chin_hakha.type_the_chess_notation_for_the_highli: A ceumi square caah chess notation ṭial
chin_hakha.alternates_two_directions_see_the_squa: Alternates two directions: see-the-square name it, hear-the-name find it. 5 in a row earns the ♟️ Chess Master badge.
chin_hakha.chess_notation_works_because_it_pairs_: 💡 Chess notation works because it pairs one number-system (letters as positions) with another (numbers as positions). The "name" of the square IS its coordinate, just written differently than (5, 4).
chin_hakha.i_will_hide_4_ships_sizes_4_3_3_2_on_a: I will hide 4 ships (sizes 4, 3, 3, 2) on a 10×10 grid. Letters A-J across, numbers 1-10 down. Call coordinates to find them. All ships sunk = you win.
chin_hakha.call_coordinates_to_find_the_ships: Call coordinates to find the ships.
chin_hakha.click_any_cell_to_fire_hit_miss_a_ship: Click any cell to fire. 💥 = hit, · = miss. A ship is sunk when all its cells are hit.
chin_hakha.type_a_battleship_coordinate_like_b5_t: Type a Battleship coordinate like B5, then press Enter to fire
chin_hakha.or_tab_through_cells_and_press_enter: asiloah cells ah Tab law Enter dep
chin_hakha.naval_coordinates_work_the_same_way_as: Naval coordinates work the same way as math coordinates. Letter + number = a point on the grid.
chin_hakha.latitude_and_longitude_earth_s_coordin: Latitude and longitude: Earth’s coordinate system.
chin_hakha.lat_tells_you_how_far_north_south_of_t: Lat tells you how far north/south of the equator (0° to 90°, N positive, S negative). Lon tells you how far east/west of the prime meridian (−180° to 180°). Every place on Earth has two numbers.
chin_hakha.practice_mode_find_the_place_from_its_: 🎯 Practice mode — coordinates in hmun kha hmuh
chin_hakha.click_on_the_map_above_within_15_of_th: Click on the map above. Within 15° of the target counts as correct.
chin_hakha.trains_spatial_reasoning_lat_lon_to_a_: Trains spatial reasoning: lat/lon to a position on the planet. 5 correct earns the 🌍 World Geographer badge.
chin_hakha.every_lat_lon_pair_is_a_coordinate_jus: 💡 Every (lat, lon) pair is a coordinate just like (x, y), just at planetary scale. Negative lat = south, negative lon = west. GPS, weather maps, ship navigation — all the same idea.
chin_hakha.why_these_are_all_coordinate_planes: 💡 Zeicah hi vialte hi coordinate planes an si
chin_hakha.the_file_letter_a_h_is_column_1_8_the_: The file letter a-h is column 1-8. The rank number is row 1-8. e4 = (5, 4) underneath.
chin_hakha.identical_structure_to_chess_letter_fo: Identical structure to chess. Letter for column, number for row. B5 = (2, 5).
chin_hakha.latitude_longitude_degrees_north_south: Latitude + longitude: degrees north/south + degrees east/west.
chin_hakha.same_two_number_pair_idea_scaled_to_a_: Same two-number-pair idea, scaled to a sphere. Portland, Maine is at (43.66°N, 70.26°W). GPS, weather, ship navigation: all coordinates.
chin_hakha.every_grid_system_in_the_world_is_a_fi: every grid system in the world is a (first-number, second-number) pair. Once a student sees that chess notation and (x, y) are the same thing, the algebra grid stops feeling alien.
chin_hakha.reset_all_points_lines_and_quadrant_to: Points, lines, le quadrant tour reset
chin_hakha.fill_in_rise_y_run_x_then_slope_m_rise: Fill in rise (Δy), run (Δx), then slope (m = rise/run)
chin_hakha.try_2x_1_linear_slope_2_x_3_negative_s: Try: 2x+1 (linear, slope 2), -x+3 (negative slope, y-intercept 3), x^2 (parabola), 0.5x-2 (fractional slope). Use ^ for exponents.
chin_hakha.sliders_for_x_and_y_widget_tells_you_w: Sliders for x and y. Widget tells you which discrete region you are in. No score, no reveal.
chin_hakha.hypothesis_what_sign_combinations_defi: Hypothesis: What sign combinations define each quadrant?
chin_hakha.place_a_point_in_each_quadrant_look_at: Place a point in each quadrant. Look at the signs.
chin_hakha.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ka hngalh — kamah ṭong in chim
chin_hakha.explain_the_sign_pattern_that_defines_: Explain the sign pattern that defines each quadrant.
chin_hakha.design_note_discrete_7_state_region_ma: Design note: discrete 7-state region marker; no coordinate score; no reveal — by design.
